arts.ttl: Daniel Farke outlines Christmas Day Leeds United plans ahead of Stoke City
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke and his squad are preparing as usual for a Boxing Day trip to Stoke City today, as fans around the country celebrate Christmas Day. We’ve drawn a line under an impressive win and we’re now up to deliver a good performance and result on Boxing Day. Tough games are coming up, this is traditionally always a tough away fixture at Stoke.

arts.ttl: Everton's decision on Jack Harrison future gives Leeds United surprise headache to solve
arts.sum: It is increasingly likely Harrison will now be back at Elland Road at the end of the season as Leeds prepare for the return of a player who still has three years remaining on a contract signed back when they were a Premier League club. Under contract with Leeds until the summer of 2028 after agreeing a new five-year deal in April 2023, Harrison was out the door just a few months later after wanting to return to the Premier League following Leeds' relegation.

arts.ttl: Leeds United next five Championship fixtures compared to Burnley, Sheffield United and Sunderland
arts.sum: A point ahead of them are Burnley after their 2-1 win home win over Watford, and Sheffield United are still top thanks to two Kieffer Moore goals away against his old club, Cardiff City . Sheffield United's next five Championship fixtures

arts.ttl: Stoke v Leeds preview: Team news, Sky Sports details and more
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Stoke City this Boxing Day looking to end 2025 on the high in their final two games of the season. The game is scheduled to kick-off at 8pm on Boxing Day, meaning Leeds play last out of every team in the Championship that day.

arts.ttl: Raphinha's rise to Barcelona from Brazil slums to Leeds United as told by his family
arts.sum: “Raphael got involved in the project after he went to Portugal when he started playing for Vitória de Guimarães, as he became a reference for the neighbourhood boys who dream of being a football player like him,” Belloli tells me. For a short period of time that no Leeds United fan will forget, Raphinha lit up Elland Road and indeed the Premier League with his play for the Whites.

arts.ttl: Stoke City transfer state of play, situation with FFP, loans and who will be in charge
arts.sum: The Championship transfer window opens in a week and Stoke City, regardless of whatever happens between now and then, will need to strengthen their squad. Narcis Pelach has made it clear he would like to add a bit more physicality and a little more experience to a young group to help the big task of hauling the club up the league table over the next four or five months and beyond.

arts.ttl: 'Disrespect' point made about Sheffield Utd and Burnley by Leeds United skipper Ethan Ampadu
arts.sum: Ampadu was also asked about the difficult run of results Leeds had at this time last season, when they ended 2023 with a 17-point deficit to Leicester at the top of the league. “I know there's a lot of people talking about stuff away from home, but we understand away from home and home games can be different, but we want to try and make it the same.

arts.ttl: Leeds transfer shock and Championship title change in things to expect at Xmas
arts.sum: As things stand Leeds United's sole aim is to ensure they are a Premier League club once again come the start of next season. One thing we are certain we can predict this Christmas period is indigestion and the Turkey food sweats as Christmas dinner gives way and we start to get ready for a different type of feast, the Boxing Day treat Leeds United will hopefully have in store on the evening.

arts.ttl: Leeds in pole position to sign 15-goal Aston Villa star in January
arts.sum: Leeds United may have the edge in the race to sign Aston Villa striker Louie Barry on loan in January, according to reports. Barry enjoyed a stunning first half of the season on loan with League One outfit Stockport County, netting 15 goals and three assists in 22 appearances across all competitions.
